title: Classic Problems in Magnetohydrodynamics: Interactive Web Edition
description: Publish-only static website for the interactive web edition of Classic Problems in Magnetohydrodynamics. This archive contains deployable HTML lecture pages, browser-based physics explorers, figures, media assets, and the bundled PDF, but not the LaTeX manuscript or source build workflow.
